zh.lifeSummary: 當Ruprecht III von der Pfalz於1352年5月15日出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 武特拉利亞安格時，他的父親Rupert II von Wittelsbach von der Pfalz27歲，母親Beatrice d'Aragon25歲。他於1374年6月27日與Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg在德國海因里希_奧斯普斯可萊斯 格爾達普安格結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1410年5月18日在德國賀瑟可萊斯 奧本海享年58歲，埋葬在德國巴登-爾特波格海德爾格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ruprecht III von der Pfalz于1352年5月15日出生在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 武特拉利亞安格时，他的父亲Rupert II von Wittelsbach von der Pfalz27岁，母亲Beatrice d'Aragon25岁。他于1374年6月27日与Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg在德国海因里希_奧斯普斯可萊斯 格爾達普安格结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1410年5月18日在德国賀瑟可萊斯 奧本海享年58岁，埋葬在德国巴登-爾特波格海德爾格。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: der
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Zoltan, Istvan, Janos, Lajos.
Hungarian (Dér): from the old personal name Dér of Turkic origin, or a nickname for a gray-haired man, from the vocabulary word dér ‘hoarfrost’.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 謝, see   Xie   1.

variants.name: Xie
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Hong, Li, Ming, Ying, Min, Qing, Yuan, Bin, Hui, Ping, Wei, Xiaoli, Ding, Chang, Lan, Quan, Cong, Dang, Hai, Tian, Yiping.

Mandarin form of the surname 謝, meaning ‘thank’ in Chinese: (i) from Xie (謝), the name of an ancient state (possibly located in Nanyang in Henan province), annexed around the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ).Later this place was probably granted to Shen Bo (the Earl of Shen), uncle of King Xuan of Zhou (reigned 827–782  BC ). After it was annexed during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), the name of the state was adopted as a surname. (ii) adopted in place of the surname Zhi-Le (直勒) by Xie Xiaozheng (謝孝政), an official during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Pfalz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from the Palatinate (German Pfalz), a region in southwestern Germany.

variants.name: Pfalzgraf
meanings: German: status name for the governor or judge at an imperial court, or for someone in the service of such a dignitary, from Middle High German phalenzgrāve. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare Pfaltzgraff .

nameMeanings.name: Ruprecht
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Ruprecht III von der Pfalz was born on 15 May 1352, in Amberg, Unterallgäu, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Rupert II von Wittelsbach von der Pfalz, was 27 and his mother, Beatrice d'Aragon, was 25. He married Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg on 27 June 1374, in Amberg, Goldap, East Prussia, Prussia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 18 May 1410, in Oppenheim, Hesse, Germany, at the age of 58, and was buried in Heidelberg, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ruprecht III von der Pfalz est né le 15 mai 1352, à Amberg, Landkreis Unterallgäu, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Rupert II von Wittelsbach von der Pfalz, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Beatrice d'Aragon, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg le 27 juin 1374, à Amberg, Kreis Goldap, Prusse Orientale, Prusse, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 18 mai 1410, à Kreis Oppenheim, Hessen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Heidelberg, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ruprecht III von der Pfalz am 15. Mai 1352 in Amberg, Landkreis Unterallgäu, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rupert II von Wittelsbach von der Pfalz 27 und seine Mutter Beatrice d'Aragon 25. Er hat am 27. Juni 1374 in Amberg, Kreis Goldap, Ostpreußen, Preußen, Deutschland Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Mai 1410 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Kreis Oppenheim, Hessen, Deutschland und wurde in Heidelberg, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ruprecht III von der Pfalz è nato il il 15 maggio 1352 nel Amberg, Landkreis Unterallgäu, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Rupert II von Wittelsbach von der Pfalz, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice d'Aragon, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg il 27 giugno 1374, nel Amberg, Kreis Goldap, Ostpreußen, Preußen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 18 maggio 1410, nel Kreis Oppenheim, Hessen, Germania, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Heidelberg, Baden-Württemberg, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Ruprecht III von der Pfalzが1352年5月15日にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ウンテラルグaウアンバーグで生まれた時，父Rupert II von Wittelsbach von der Pfalzは27歳，母Beatrice d'Aragonは25歳であった。1374年6月27日にドイツプレウssンオストプレウssンクレイス ゴールダップアンバーグでElisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1410年5月18日にドイツヘセンクレイス オップエンヘイムで58歳で死去し，ドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグヘイデルバーグにて埋葬された。

ko.Heidelberg, Seiffen, Kreis Freiberg, Sax: 독일 작센 크레이스 프레이버그 세이펜 헤이들버그
ko.Neunburg vorm Wald, Bayern, Germany: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 니우버그 보 월드
ko.Lahneck Castle in Oberlahnstein: 독일 플레우ss 헤센-나소 크레이스 산k트 고르쇼센 오벌라스타인 라니크
ko.Amberg, Goldap, East Prussia, Prussia, G: 독일 플레우ss 오스트플레우ss 크레이스 골다프 아버그
ko.lifeSummary: Ruprecht III von der Pfalz(이)가 1352년 5월 15일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 운터알그a 아버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rupert II von Wittelsbach von der Pfalz(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice d'Aragon(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1374년 6월 27일 독일 플레우ss 오스트플레우ss 크레이스 골다프 아버그에서 Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1410년 5월 18일 독일 헤센 크레이스 펜하임에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 바데-wu르테버그 헤이들버그에 묻혔다.

pt.15 May 1352–18 May 1410: 15 de maio de 1352–18 de maio de 1410
pt.Heidelberg, Seiffen, Kreis Freiberg, Sax: Heidelberg, Seiffen, Kreis Freiberg, Sachsen, Alemanha
pt.Neunburg vorm Wald, Bayern, Germany: Landkreis Neunburg vorm Wald, Bayern, Alemanha
pt.Lahneck Castle in Oberlahnstein: Lahneck, Oberlahnstein, Kreis Sankt Goarshausen, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemanha
pt.Amberg, Goldap, East Prussia, Prussia, G: Amberg, Kreis Goldap, Ostpreußen, Preußen, Alemanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ruprecht III von der Pfalz nasceu em 15 de maio de 1352, em Amberg, Landkreis Unterallgäu, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Rupert II von Wittelsbach von der Pfalz, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice d'Aragon, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg em 27 de junho de 1374, em Amberg, Kreis Goldap, Ostpreußen, Preußen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de maio de 1410, em Kreis Oppenheim, Hessen, Alemanha, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Heidelberg, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha.

ru.Amberg, Goldap, East Prussia, Prussia, G: эмбирг, крис голдап, остпреуssен, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ruprecht III von der Pfalz родился 15 мая 1352 г. в местности эмбирг, ландкрис унтираллгaу, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Rupert II von Wittelsbach von der Pfalz было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice d'Aragon, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg 27 июня 1374 г. в местности эмбирг, крис голдап, остпреуssен, Пруссия, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 18 мая 1410 г. в местности крис оппеним, Гессен, Германия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности хиделбирг, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ruprecht III von der Pfalz nació el 15 de mayo de 1352, en Amberg, Landkreis Unterallgäu, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Rupert II von Wittelsbach von der Pfalz, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Beatrice d'Aragon, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg el 27 de junio de 1374, en Amberg, Kreis Goldap, Ostpreußen, Preußen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 18 de mayo de 1410, en Kreis Oppenheim, Hessen, Alemania, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Heidelberg, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania.
